creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note the following quote from the README for the current strace version
4.7 at SourceForge:

[...]
* Portability
 * Removed all non-Linux code. After years of neglect, that
   dead code just hampered further strace development.
[...]

I have not looked at this any closer, but maybe this port should just be
removed from the ports tree if the port's version does not work and the
latest version does not support operating systems other than Linux.

Regards,
Stefan
